title: Beyond Semantic Relevance: Counterfactual Risk Minimization for Robust Retrieval-Augmented Generation

defines.name: CoRM-RAG
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented generation framework that uses counterfactual risk minimization to align retrieval with decision safety under biased or misleading queries.

defines.name: Evidence Critic
defines.definition: A lightweight scoring model that predicts the robustness utility of a document-query pair for supporting correct decisions under query perturbations.

problem: Standard semantic relevance-based RAG can retrieve sycophantic evidence under biased or false-premise queries, worsening hallucinations instead of improving decision reliability.
